summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 new homepage acquisition components (BetaBanner, PlatformStatsBar, Testimonials). All components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Banner dismissal, localStorage persistence, CSS variable coordination with Navbar, qualitative stats mode, testimonials rendering, mobile responsiveness and i18n all verified working. No regressions detected in /help, /beneficios, /dashboard routes.

integration_issues.flow: BetaBanner dismiss when HowItWorksModal is open on first visit
integration_issues.issue: HowItWorksModal (Radix Dialog) focus-trap intercepts outside clicks, so clicking [data-testid=beta-banner-dismiss] while the modal is open silently fails (handler never runs, localStorage not set, --beta-banner-h stays 36px). Works correctly once the user closes the modal (via Escape or 'Entendido, empezar'). Low priority because natural user flow is to close the modal first, but on first visit the 2 overlays appear together and dismiss is non-functional until modal is closed.

issues: HowItWorksModal (Dialog) auto-opens on first visit and visually covers the BetaBanner + hero search simultaneously — consider delaying modal auto-open by ~300ms or gating it until after banner is acknowledged so the two announcements don't compete for attention.
PlatformStatsBar 'Si' label for Reembolso garantizado lacks accent 'Sí' (uses ASCII). Matches rest of codebase (no accents anywhere in Spanish UI) so consistent — just flagging.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Defer HowItWorksModal auto-open or close it automatically when BetaBanner dismiss is clicked, so first-visit users can dismiss the banner without first dismissing the modal.
(Nit) Consider using Spanish accents ('Sí', 'Calificación', 'Reembolso garantizado sí') once the whole UI is accent-normalized.
critical_code_review_comments: BetaBanner.jsx cleanup effect resets --beta-banner-h to '0px' on unmount. Because BetaBanner is mounted inside Layout and Layout is remounted per-route, every route transition briefly collapses the banner offset before re-applying it on the next mount. Works fine today because Navbar uses CSS var fallback, but if Layout ever memoizes routes this could flash. Consider hoisting the banner above <Routes> so it mounts once.

BetaBanner initial state is setDismissed(true) to prevent flash, but this means the banner appears 1 paint after hydration (useEffect runs post-mount). Acceptable, but using useLayoutEffect would avoid the 1-frame no-banner flash for users who haven't dismissed.
PlatformStatsBar threshold logic (bookings >= 50 OR reviews >= 10) is hard-coded in the component — consider moving to a constants file or backend-driven flag so product can tune without a deploy.

Testimonials.jsx placeholder quotes are hard-coded; disclaimer footer '* Testimonios basados en experiencias de usuarios beta. Publicados con autorizacion.' is good, but the avatars are random Unsplash portraits — swap for real beta-user photos (or generic illustrations) before GA to avoid misrepresentation.

HomePage.jsx uses Promise.all but utilityAPI.getPlatformStats falls back to {data: null} on error — PlatformStatsBar returns null when stats is null so the section silently disappears if the endpoint is down. Consider showing the qualitative fallback with business_count=0 instead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 covered only the 3 new homepage UI components (BetaBanner, PlatformStatsBar, Testimonials). Verified: banner visible+dismiss+localStorage persist+CSS var (36px->0px)+Navbar offset tracking; 4 qualitative stats (Negocios activos=7, Reembolso garantizado=Si, Compensacion no-show=$50 MXN, Beta abierta=CDMX) since bookings<50 & reviews<10; 3 testimonial cards; mobile 375px collapses stats grid to 2 cols (163.5px x 2) and all components remain visible; /help and /beneficios still render; /dashboard correctly redirects to /login. Only noteworthy integration nit: HowItWorksModal Radix Dialog focus-trap blocks banner dismiss on first-visit until modal is closed by user.
rca of the issue: N/A - no critical issues found. The only integration nit (banner dismiss blocked when HowItWorksModal is open) is caused by Radix UI Dialog focus-trap behavior which is by-design. Fix options: (a) call setDismissed from an Escape keydown listener, (b) auto-close the modal when banner is interacted with, or (c) delay modal opening until after banner has been seen.
